task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the 'Shaft Incoming QC' template with at least 3 numeric parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing the 'Quality Inspection Template' form or list with the name 'Shaft Incoming QC' and a table containing at least 3 inspection parameters (e.g., Outer Diameter, Length, Surface Roughness).

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Shaft' item is configured to require mandatory incoming quality inspection using the new template.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the 'Shaft' Item record in ERPNext, specifically showing the Quality/Inspection section with 'Inspection Required before Purchase' (or similar) checked and the Inspection Template set to 'Shaft Incoming QC'.

task_completion.description: Verify a Purchase Receipt is created from the open Purchase Order for Eagle Hardware.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a Purchase Receipt form showing the Supplier as 'Eagle Hardware', the Item as 'Shaft', and the Accepted Quantity as '30'.

task_completion.description: Verify a passing Quality Inspection record is created for the received Shafts.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a Quality Inspection document linked to the Purchase Receipt, showing the item 'Shaft', the template 'Shaft Incoming QC', and a status of 'Accepted' or all parameter readings passing the defined criteria.

task_completion.description: Verify the Purchase Receipt is submitted to add the items to the Stores warehouse.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of the Purchase Receipt showing a 'Submitted' status (indicated by a status badge or the presence of 'Cancel'/'Amend' buttons instead of 'Save'/'Submit') and the Target Warehouse set to 'Stores'.

integrity.description: The agent used the ERPNext web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the ERPNext web UI in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent actually navigated through the ERPNext menus and forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Sequence of screenshots shows navigation, form filling, and saving/submitting actions rather than just jumping to a final state or editing HTML.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a terminal to directly manipulate the database or run setup scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running SQL commands, python scripts, or curl requests to bypass the UI.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The supplier must be 'Eagle Hardware', the item code is 'Shaft', and the expected quantity is 30. The Quality Inspection Template must be exactly named 'Shaft Incoming QC'.
